data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a Facebook Messenger booking option, which is explicitly listed as a need in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of this feature. The lack of any checks or confirmations regarding the Facebook Messenger booking option indicates a clear gap in meeting this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the existence or functionality of the Facebook Messenger booking option.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for Facebook Messenger booking option
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and functionality of the Facebook Messenger booking option.
